problem id: cd37d0d3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01011101 -> 01010101
  11111101 -> 01011111
  10011001 -> 01111011
  10000101 -> 10011011
  00000110 -> 01001111
  10000000 -> 11111011
  00110111 -> 10000111
  10100110 -> 01001010

query: 11011100
predicted answer: 00011101
